ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-30-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The petition being duly filed and noticed, and there being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 9, 2014 is admitted to probate. Gary D. Swanson is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 12, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar. Frank Mahoney is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-02-2021 Continued To Jun-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
